title: Create a new tab and switch to it from the TabStrip
description: Verifies a user can create a new tab, see it appear in the tab strip, and activate it by clicking it.

steps.description: Click on "New Tab" (plus) button in the tab strip
Verify element "a new tab" is visible in the tab strip
Click on the newly created tab in the tab strip
Verify element "active tab loading indicator" is visible

title: Close a tab and verify the adjacent tab becomes active
description: Verifies closing a tab removes it from the strip and focus shifts to a neighboring tab.

steps.description: Click on "New Tab" (plus) button in the tab strip
Click on the newly created tab in the tab strip
Click on "Close" button on the active tab
Verify element "the closed tab" is not visible in the tab strip
Verify element "a different tab is active" is visible

title: Switch between two tabs and confirm active tab URL changes
description: Verifies switching tabs updates the visible active-tab URL display in the top bar.

steps.description: Click on "New Tab" (plus) button in the tab strip
Click on the first tab in the tab strip
Verify element "active tab URL display" is visible
Click on the second tab in the tab strip
Verify element "active tab URL display" is visible

title: Web-only preview limitation: creating a new tab does not add a tab when Electron bridge is missing
description: Verifies that in environments without the Electron bridge, clicking New Tab does not create additional tabs and the tab strip stays unchanged.

steps.description: Verify element "window.electronAPI undefined message" is visible
Click on "New Tab" (plus) button in the tab strip
Verify text "No new tab" is visible

title: Navigate to a valid HTTPS URL via the omnibox and see the URL update after load
description: Verifies that entering a valid URL in the omnibox triggers navigation, shows a loading indicator, and updates the omnibox to the final URL.

title: Search query entry navigates to search results in the active tab
description: Verifies that entering a non-URL search query in the omnibox triggers navigation to a search results page.

steps.description: Type "cats videos" into the omnibox input

title: Stop an in-progress navigation using the Stop button
description: Verifies that when a navigation is in progress, the Stop button can halt loading and the loading indicator disappears.

steps.description: Verify element "loading indicator" is not visible

title: Press Enter with empty omnibox input does not navigate
description: Verifies that submitting an empty omnibox does not trigger navigation and leaves the omnibox value unchanged.

steps.description: Verify element "loading indicator" is not visible

title: Invalid URL input does not navigate and does not change the current address
description: Verifies that entering an invalid URL does not successfully navigate and does not result in a sustained loading state.

steps.description: Verify element "loading indicator" is not visible

title: Loading indicator appears when navigation starts
description: Verifies that the omnibox shows a visible loading indicator immediately after starting navigation.

title: Stop control is not shown when there is no active load
description: Verifies that when the browser is idle (no load in progress), the Stop control is not visible.

steps.description: Verify element "loading indicator" is not visible
Verify element "Stop" button is not visible

title: Open and close Bookmarks panel via sidebar and ✕ button
description: Verifies the Bookmarks panel opens from the sidebar and can be closed with the ✕ button.
category: Sidebar panels (Bookmarks, History, Downloads, Workspaces, Settings)

steps.description: Click the Bookmarks icon to open the bookmarks panel

title: Open and close History panel via sidebar and ✕ button
description: Verifies the History panel opens from the sidebar and can be closed with the ✕ button.
category: Sidebar panels (Bookmarks, History, Downloads, Workspaces, Settings)

steps.description: Click the History icon to open the history panel

title: Switch between Bookmarks and Settings panels from the sidebar
description: Verifies opening one panel then switching to another updates the visible panel content.
category: Sidebar panels (Bookmarks, History, Downloads, Workspaces, Settings)

steps.description: Click the Bookmarks icon to open the bookmarks panel
Click the Settings icon to open settings

title: Close active panel leaves no panel visible
description: Verifies that closing an open panel via ✕ hides the panel content area.
category: Sidebar panels (Bookmarks, History, Downloads, Workspaces, Settings)

steps.description: Click the Settings icon to open settings

title: Open Workspaces panel and verify content renders
description: Verifies the Workspaces panel opens from the sidebar and displays its content.
category: Sidebar panels (Bookmarks, History, Downloads, Workspaces, Settings)

steps.description: Click the Workspaces icon to open the workspaces panel

title: Workspaces panel: selecting a workspace updates visible workspace selection (UI-level)
description: Verifies clicking a workspace entry changes the visible selection/active workspace indicator in the Workspaces panel.
category: Sidebar panels (Bookmarks, History, Downloads, Workspaces, Settings)

steps.description: Click the Workspaces icon to open the workspaces panel
Click a workspace entry in the workspaces panel
Verify the clicked workspace entry appears selected or active

title: Open Settings panel from main UI
description: Verifies the Settings panel can be opened from the main route and displays expected controls.

steps.description: Verify text "Yeni Gizli Pencere" is visible

title: Toggle AdBlock switch ON and observe UI state change
description: Verifies toggling the AdBlock switch changes the visible switch state in the Settings panel.

steps.description: Verify element "AdBlock switch" is visible in the ON state
Verify element "AdBlock switch" is visible in the OFF state

title: AdBlock toggle persists after closing and reopening Settings panel
description: Verifies the AdBlock switch state is preserved when the Settings panel is closed and reopened within the same session.

steps.description: Verify element "AdBlock switch" is visible in the ON state
Click on the "Settings" icon to close the Settings panel
Click on the "Settings" icon to open the Settings panel
Verify element "AdBlock switch" is visible in the ON state

title: Incognito action does nothing in web-only preview (no Electron bridge)
description: Verifies the UI remains stable when "Yeni Gizli Pencere" is clicked but no new window can be created in a web-only preview.

steps.description: Verify text "Yeni Gizli Pencere" is visible

title: AdBlock toggles but does not affect page content when engine is not initialized
description: Verifies the AdBlock toggle remains usable even if the adblock engine is not active, without asserting ad-filtering outcomes.

steps.description: Verify element "AdBlock switch" is visible in the ON state
Verify element "AdBlock switch" is visible in the OFF state

title: Settings panel remains responsive after rapid interactions
description: Verifies the Settings panel does not become stuck or unresponsive after multiple quick actions on AdBlock and Incognito controls.
